_publications._publicationTitle: NF1-Specific Growth Charts for Head Circumference Over the First 3 Years of Life.

_contextSnippet: While 87% of non-NF1 head circumference measurements are contained between 3rd and 97th centiles of CDC growth charts, 23% of NF1 data exceed the 97th centile
resourceName: Centers for Disease Control (CDC) growth charts
details: 87% of non-NF1 head circumference measurements contained between 3rd and 97th centiles, but only 76.7% of NF1 measurements contained between corresponding CDC centiles
